title: Dawn of the Flood
description: Experts say: “One single Flood spore can destroy a species.” and it seems to be spreading at a quicker rate than ever before. What will you do to survive this alien infection that took the world by storm. Will you thrive or perish?
body:
# Dawn of the Flood by Forge Labs ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
Experts say: “One single Flood spore can destroy a species.” and it seems to be spreading at a quicker rate than ever before. What will you do to survive this alien infection that took the world by storm. Will you thrive with what you have, or perish by the infection and become apart of it?
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)

中文翻译 (Chinese Translation) # 洪水黎明》由 Forge Labs 制作 ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
专家表示：“仅一个洪魔孢子就能摧毁一个物种。” 而且它似乎正以前所未有的速度传播。面对这场席卷全球的外星感染，你将如何生存？你会利用现有资源顽强生存，还是被感染同化，成为它的一部分？
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
